case_title: SZABO & ASSOCIATES LLC VS. ERIC STRONG

docket_entries.description: ORDER FINDING VENUE IS PROPER AND TO CONTINUE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-25-2022 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-25-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SZABO & ASSOCIATES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MAXWELL SZABO. DEFENDANT ERIC STRONG IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS ADDRESSED AND VENUE IS FOUND TO BE PROPER. DEFENDANT REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT EXHIBITS TO THE COURT AND OTHER PARTY. DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE JULY HEARING. FILINGS WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SZABO & ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, ERIC
CHALLENGE OF VENUE NOTICE -SENT TO ALL PARTIES
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT STRONG, ERIC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE NOTIFED ON 5-17-22 BY TELEPHONE OF TODAY'S CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF SZABO & ASSOCIATES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC STRONG IS NOT PRESENT. (506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SZABO & ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT STRONG, ERIC
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT STRONG, ERIC
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM DEFENDANT ON ZOOM ORALLY STIPULATED. FILED BY SZABO & ASSOCIATES LLC STRONG, ERIC
